title: Llevar + time + gerund
subtitle: Say have been doing something.
overview: Llevar + time + gerund is very natural Spanish.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I have been studying for one year.
He/she has been waiting for two hours.
We have been talking for a long time.

items.en: I have been learning Spanish for six months.

items.es: Llevo una hora esperando el autobús.
items.en: I have been waiting for the bus for one hour.

items.es: Ana lleva dos años viviendo aquí.
items.en: Ana has been living here for two years.
We have been working all day.
How long have you been studying?
